title: Determine the exact value of R(B4, B7)
micro_paper_assessment: Still micro-paper eligible if closed exactly, but the current solve output is only a structural slice plus a no-circulant boundary result.
generalization_signal: moderate; the codegree-to-degree-sum plus Goodman concentration template should transfer to nearby one-gap book Ramsey pairs.
candidate_theorem_slice: Any 22-vertex graph with no B4 and no complement B7 must satisfy d(u)+d(v) <= 23 on edges, d(u)+d(v) >= 14 on nonedges, and sum_v (d(v)-10)^2 <= 44; in addition, no 22-vertex circulant witness exists.
next_action: Use the structural slice to analyze extensions of the published 21-vertex lower-bound construction first; verify the no-circulant result exactly and treat the unrestricted search only as heuristic evidence.
